assumptions: Estimated using stated cost and carbon assumptions.
Deadline feasibility uses deterministic precomputed travel times plus simple collection buffers.
Supplier F is treated as a structured fallback with prepared delivery assumptions.
Transport carbon is estimated from distance x vehicle factor x trip count.
All carbon values are estimates using fictional demo assumptions.

conditions: Supplier fallback added to fulfil the remaining quantity.

assumptions: Transfer payments are treated as redistribution of existing value, not new system-wide value.
All values are deterministic demo estimates in Malaysian ringgit.

excluded_resources.reason_text: Excluded because collection and travel cannot finish before the selected deadline.
Excluded from automatic recommendation because the product label was unreadable and the condition could not be sufficiently verified.

evidence_notes: Included as a deterministic mismatch test resource.
excluded_resources.reason_text: Excluded because the product specification does not match the request.

evidence_notes: Included as an unavailable fallback example.
excluded_resources.reason_text: Excluded because the source exceeds the maximum allowed distance.

reasons: Urgency changed the plan because one or more reuse sources could no longer complete collection and delivery in time.
Partial reuse recommended because it reduced new purchasing while keeping the plan feasible.
Supplier F filled the remaining quantity after eligible reuse sources were exhausted.
Estimated total cost remains lower than normal procurement.
Estimated carbon remains lower than normal procurement after transport.
Collection and delivery remain feasible within the current deadline.
